releaseNotes: Fix: multichannel audio (5.1/7.1) now pads to 8 channels instead of downmixing to stereo - matches the channel count confirmed working on this hardware, fixing movies/shows that previously crashed on playback. Fix: a Dolby Vision decoder variant (DVAV) wasn't being filtered out like its DVHE counterpart, causing some 4K HDR episodes to crash on the video decoder. Tweak: buffer depth increased slightly on the Smooth profile to better absorb brief provider-side delivery dips without a visible stall.
